Today I'm remembering your weirdness and your extraordinary capacity to love.

posts.raw_content:
I moved to Ocala FL at the end of2006.  About a year later I would see this guy at the busy intersection 2 miles from my house as election season was starting.  He would be out there with his homemade signs for 4-8 hours every day.  They were often misspelled but you got the message.  He usually had a dozen different signs.  He would cross the 6 lane road and face the sign to whichever way traffic was going, as he got older he stuck to the corner closest to his mobile home.  I would see him every single day coming home from work.  There were times I would give him a beep when it wasnt the most popular time to do so.  He had his MAGA hat early on and wore it for the last 11 years.  His signs were trashing obama, trashing congress, trashing biden and pro trump pro rubio pro sheriff and occasionally pro republican candidate for whoever was running.  This guy spent his retirement campaigning for Trump for free every single day.  

https://www.facebook.com/share/p/1AcP12U1XC/
